sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungdam kohna tawh Ama kong pi ah lut unla
Ama huang sungah tum ta un
Tuni pen Topa' hong piak sa ninpha hi a
Hong lungdam sak manin ka kipak hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong lungdamsak hi hong lungdamsak hi
Hong lungdamsak manin ka kipak hi
Hong lungdamsak hi hong lungdamsak hi
Hong lungdamsak manin ka kipak hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa hoih hi a itna kipin kho tawntung hi
Tua a hihma'n a minphat un
Ama thumanna a khang a khang in kip hi
Hong lungdamsak manin ka kipak hi
